psychologicalTheme: Psychic crystal prophets. Secure attachment with high emotional perception. Type 5w4: contemplative observers who seek understanding through psychic resonance. First-contact attitude varies depending on what they sense — their range includes slight suspicion because some species feel psychically 'wrong' to them. High openness and honesty-humility make them the galaxy's most trustworthy advisors. Under stress, becomes scattered and escapist (Type 7 direction). Very low Dark Triad.
